component.name: UMML Manager
component.summary: Browse, edit, profile, and deploy UM:PD mods

description.p: UMML Manager provides an immutable mod library, profiles, load order, conflict previews, and verified transactional deployment.

It detects supported game installations, browses Global and Japan Umamusume GameBanana mods with bounded preview images, automatically prepares compatible imports, finds compatible local packages, creates editable copies, and rejects stale or incompatible profile plans.
The built-in Studio preserves the legacy loader's character, dress, training, story, model-swap, translation, cleanup, database, preview, manual-load, and restore tools.
Hardens interrupted recovery and snapshot races, refuses unsafe baseline adoption, preserves verified installation and preparation identity, and completes the source-installed Studio runtime.
Centralizes fail-closed deployment and import safety, enforces every planner blocker for GUI and CLI callers, hardens legacy Studio process inspection, and adds concurrency and migration regressions.
Fixes deeply nested legacy GameBanana imports and synchronizes visible button states with selection, background work, profile blockers, paging, and game-running safety.

Automatically prepares compatible imports, preserves source packages when preparation fails, and safely normalizes provider-confirmed loose legacy UMML asset archives that omit the modern assets wrapper.

Fixes disabled GameBanana installation controls when catalogue rows omit downloadable files by hydrating submission details asynchronously, preserving an Install latest fallback, and normalizing alternate file-container response shapes.

Completes the preview-provider wiring, runs manager regressions with the full pinned runtime dependency set, verifies Pillow imaging support in both package formats, and synchronizes release documentation after the triple audit.

Adds a full source audit, versioned persistent schemas, path-contained and hash-verified deployment, target-scoped baselines, durable recovery journals, tamper detection, stale metadata checks, provider/backend contracts, selected-mod previews, and an expanded adversarial test suite.
Fixes portable HTTPS trust on Fedora/Bazzite and other Linux families while retaining mandatory certificate verification.
Adds an AppImage built from the same frozen runtime as the Debian package, shared checksum artifacts, package-parity checks, and bounded archive extraction.
Separates source application files from user data, prevents stale launchers from shadowing the Debian package, and hardens profile, registry, deployment-state, import, and GameBanana behavior.
Adds first-launch Steam and Proton detection and automatically prepares the readable metadata database.
Adds the polished multi-workspace interface, GameBanana browser, local mod detection, editable workspaces, and complete legacy Studio compatibility.
Initial separately packaged manager foundation with profiles, conflict resolution, transactional deployment, and GameBanana import.
